headline: Two GPWR-Litigated Matters Featured in Broadridge’s 2026 Global Class Action Annual Report’s Top 10 Most Complicated Recoveries of 2025
summary: LOS ANGELES, March 03, 2026--Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP ("GPWR") announces that two matters the Firm litigated are spotlighted in Broadridge’s 2026 Global Class Action Annual Report among the "top 10 most complicated class action asset recovery opportunities of 2025": Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. Securities Litigation ($433.5M) and ViacomCBS (Archegos) Securities Litigation ($120M).
